about.summary: Core packages for Apache Airflow, schedule and API server

about.license: MIT AND BSD-3-Clause AND BSD-2-Clause AND Apache-2.0
about.summary: Core packages for Apache Airflow, schedule and API server

name: apache-airflow-core-split
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "apache-airflow-core" %}
{% set version = "3.0.0" %}
{% set python_over = "3.13" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}-split
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/apache_airflow_core-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e1e4204fdba3d13810784b70d907e18d9ed875f52bfebd7fe2653625e0fb0e85

build:
  number: 1
  noarch: python

outputs:
  - name: {{ name }}
    script: install_airflow_core.sh
    build:
      entry_points:
        - airflow = airflow.__main__:main
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - gitpython ==3.1.44
        - gitdb ==4.0.12
        - hatchling ==1.27.0
        - packaging ==24.2
        - pathspec ==0.12.1
        - pluggy ==1.5.0
        - smmap ==5.0.2
        - tomli ==2.2.1
        - trove-classifiers ==2025.4.11.15
        - pip
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - a2wsgi >=1.10.8
        - aiosqlite >=0.20.0
        - alembic >=1.13.1,<2.0
        - argcomplete >=1.10
        - asgiref >=2.3.0
        - attrs >=22.1.0,!=25.2.0
        - cadwyn >=5.2.1
        - colorlog >=6.8.2
        - cron-descriptor >=1.2.24
        - croniter >=2.0.2
        - cryptography >=41.0.0
        - deprecated >=1.2.13
        - dill >=0.2.2
        # for all python to stay noarch: python
        - eval-type-backport >=0.2.0
        # conda-forge package includes fastapi[standard]
        - fastapi >=0.115.0,!=0.115.10
        - flask >=2.1.1
        - gitpython >=3.1.40
        - gunicorn >=20.1.0
        - httpx >=0.25.0
        # for all python to stay noarch: python
        - importlib-metadata >=6.5
        - itsdangerous >=2.0
        - jinja2 >=3.1.5
        - jsonschema >=4.19.1
        - lazy-object-proxy >=1.2.0
        - libcst >=1.1.0
        - linkify-it-py >=2.0.0
        - lockfile >=0.12.2
        - methodtools >=0.4.7
        - opentelemetry-api >=1.24.0
        - opentelemetry-exporter-otlp >=1.24.0
        - packaging >=23.2
        - pathspec >=0.9.0
        # stricter constraint for py>=312 to stay noarch: python
        - pendulum >=3.0.0,<4.0
        - pluggy >=1.5.0
        - psutil >=5.8.0
        - pydantic >=2.11.0
        - pygments >=2.0.1,!=2.19.0
        - pyjwt >=2.10.0
        - python-daemon >=3.0.0
        - python-dateutil >=2.7.0
        - python-slugify >=5.0
        - requests >=2.31.0,<3
        - rich-argparse >=1.0.0
        - rich >=13.6.0
        - setproctitle >=1.3.3
        - sqlalchemy >=1.4.49,<2.0
        - sqlalchemy-jsonfield >=1.0
        - sqlalchemy-utils >=0.41.2
        - svcs >=25.1.0
        - tabulate >=0.9.0
        - tenacity >=8.0.0,!=8.2.0
        - termcolor >=3.0.0
        - universal-pathlib >=0.2.2,!=0.2.4
        - uuid6 >=2024.7.10
        - apache-airflow-task-sdk <1.1.0,>=1.0.0
        - apache-airflow-providers-common-compat >=1.6.0
        - apache-airflow-providers-common-io >=1.5.3
        - apache-airflow-providers-common-sql >=1.25.0
        - apache-airflow-providers-smtp >=2.0.2
        - apache-airflow-providers-standard >=0.4.0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
        - airflow --help
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-aiobotocore
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - apache-airflow-providers-amazon-with-aiobotocore >=9.6.0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-async
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - eventlet >=0.37.0
        - gevent >=24.2.1
        - greenlet >=0.4.9

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-apache-atlas
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - atlasclient >=0.1.2

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-apache-webhdfs
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - apache-airflow-providers-apache-hdfs

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-cloudpickle
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - cloudpickle >=2.2.1

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-github-enterprise
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - apache-airflow-providers-fab
        - authlib >=1.0.0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-google-auth
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - apache-airflow-providers-fab
        - authlib >=1.0.0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-graphviz
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - python-graphviz >=0.12

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-kerberos
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - pykerberos >=1.1.13
        - requests-kerberos >=0.14.0
        - thrift_sasl >=0.4.2

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-ldap
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - python-ldap >=3.4.4

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-otel
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        # going with more recent versions because of incorrect deps in older versions
        - opentelemetry-exporter-prometheus >=0.51b0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-pandas
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - pandas >=2.1.2,<2.3

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-rabbitmq
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - amqp >=5.2.0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-s3fs
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - apache-airflow-providers-amazon-with-s3fs

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-sentry
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - blinker >=1.1
        - sentry-sdk >=1.32.0,!=1.33.0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-statsd
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - statsd >=3.3.0

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-uv
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - uv >=0.6.13

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

  - name: {{ name }}-with-all
    build:
      noarch: python

    requirements:
      host:
        - python {{ python_min }}
      run:
        - python >={{ python_min }},<{{ python_over }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x.x.x.x') }}
        - {{ name }}-with-aiobotocore
        - {{ name }}-with-apache-atlas
        - {{ name }}-with-apache-webhdfs
        - {{ name }}-with-cloudpickle
        - {{ name }}-with-github-enterprise
        - {{ name }}-with-google-auth
        - {{ name }}-with-graphviz
        - {{ name }}-with-kerberos
        - {{ name }}-with-ldap
        - {{ name }}-with-otel
        - {{ name }}-with-pandas
        - {{ name }}-with-rabbitmq
        - {{ name }}-with-s3fs
        - {{ name }}-with-sentry
        - {{ name }}-with-statsd
        - {{ name }}-with-uv

    test:
      imports:
        - airflow
      commands:
        - pip check
      requires:
        - python {{ python_min }}
        - pip

about:
  home: http://airflow.apache.org
  summary: Core packages for Apache Airflow, schedule and API server
  license: MIT AND BSD-3-Clause AND BSD-2-Clause AND Apache-2.0
  license_file:
    - LICENSE
    - NOTICE
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-reproducible.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-dagre-d3.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-elasticmock.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-eonasdan-bootstrap-datetimepicker.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-flask-kerberos.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-d3-shape.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-pytest-capture-warnings.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-bootstrap3-typeahead.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-datatables.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-hue.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-d3js.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-jqclock.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-moment.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-d3-tip.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-bootstrap.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-jquery.txt
    - 3rd-party-licenses/LICENSE-normalize.txt
  doc_url: http://pythonhosted.org/airflow/profiling.html
  dev_url: https://github.com/apache/airflow

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - xylar
